title: manilkara elata
intro: Manilkara elata, also known as the West African mango or dune mango, is a tree species native to West Africa, characterized by its large, mango-like fruit. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, derived from its rich concentration of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. Manilkara elata has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal disorders, offering potential health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved immune function. Herbal preparations of Manilkara elata are commonly made into decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties and alleviate related symptoms.
